rationale: Analyst run inspected GitHub issue #1 from the clone (which had no monitor/external-reports/ directory at all — workspace-sync had not round-tripped the FUSE-canonical report-1-devilwench-friendly-meta.json to git) and authored this report-1.json before discovering the prior canonical report-1-devilwench-friendly-meta.json already on FUSE from 2026-04-28. This stub overwrites the original-but-duplicative content of report-1.json so the canonical assessment of GitHub issue #1 lives in one place: report-1-devilwench-friendly-meta.json. This file is preserved (rather than deleted) because FUSE rejects unlink — operator-side allow_cowork_file_delete is required to remove it, which is out of analyst scope.
note: Future analyst runs: do not re-process this issue; canonical assessment is the friendly-meta file.
